flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pikes Peak State College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (24.3% → 20.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pikes Peak State College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.0k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pikes Peak State College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.4k → $17.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pikes Peak State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
